programme.desc: The 2026 MLS regular season continues as Red Bull New York (5-5-3) plays New York City FC (5-5-3) at Red Bull Arena. Both teams have the same points and seek a major victory. New York City FC have dominated the last five games with four victories.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.sub-title: Toronto Blue Jays at New York Yankees
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Yankees clash in the Bronx to kick off a four-game American League series. New York boasts a stellar winning record at home, while Toronto aims to overcome early road struggles. This marks their first meeting of the 2026 campaign.

programme.title: History of the Yankees
programme.desc: Origins of the Yankees up through 1956.

programme.desc: The life, playing history and broadcasting career of Yankees outfielder Bobby Murcer.
